quote: Our support tickets were piling up over weekends, driving our response times to 6 hours and tanking customer satisfaction. We deployed the Support Ticketing Bot and the Churn Predictor. Response times dropped to under a minute, and we've saved 42 high-value accounts from churning in just 30 days.

As a lean agency, content repurposing was swallowing our margins. We hired a VA for $3,000/month just to turn videos into posts. We replaced that manual bottleneck with the Content Repurposer and Social Pilot bots for less than $100 one-time. Our content volume tripled, and our leads grew by 45%.

We were bleeding gym members because we didn't have time to text people who stopped showing up. The Retention Re-engager detected inactive scans and automatically messaged them on WhatsApp. In our first month, 43 members came back to the studio. Best $39 I have ever spent in my life.

Our AP team was drowning in manual receipt copying. We integrated the Invoice Processor and Expense Auditor. Not only did we eliminate data entry errors, but the AI caught three duplicate vendor charges in our first week, saving us thousands of dollars before close.
metric: 98% reduction in manual invoice data entry

quote: Cart recovery emails were getting buried in promo tabs. The Cart Recovery Loop on WhatsApp reaches customers instantly. 22% of our abandoned cart sales are now recovered automatically with smart coupon codes generated by the bot. It's like having a 24/7 sales rep.
